name: BioAtla, Inc.
business: BioAtla is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company developing conditionally active biologics (CAB) for the treatment of solid tumor cancers. Its CAB technology exploits pH differences between the tumor microenvironment and healthy tissue to selectively bind to cancer cells. The company has no approved products and is exploring strategic options including asset sales and licensing.

exposures.sentence: We are a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company developing our novel class of highly specific and selective antibody-based therapeutics for the treatment of solid tumor cancers.
